message:
security: fix go/allocation-size-overflow in github_pipelines.go (Fixes #9261) (#9265)

Replace int(ghpCacheTTL.Seconds()) with an int64 conversion clamped to
zero in serveCached(). The previous float64→int cast could theoretically
overflow on platforms where int is 32 bits; int64 covers the full range
of time.Duration.Seconds() and the clamp ensures a non-negative value is
always written into the Cache-Control header.

All three Cache-Control Set calls in the function share the same maxAge
variable computed once at function entry.

The js/regex/missing-regexp-anchor alert (#9262) is already suppressed
with a codeql-suppress comment in ux-assertions.ts (line 150), and the
js/clear-text-storage-of-sensitive-data alert (#9259) is already fixed
in Weather.tsx, useCertManager.ts, and useDataCompliance.ts (sessionStorage
+ lgtm suppression comments). No further changes needed for those two.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
